name: Oriental Beef Fondue
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds filet mignon or any other tender cut
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze beef for 3 to 4 hours until very firm, so you can slice it paper thin.
2. Slice beef as thin as possible. I use an electric slicer.
3. Transfer slices to a plate.
4. If doing ahead, arrange sliced beef in layers separated by Saran Wrap and chill.
5. To serve: Bring beef broth to a boil in the fondue pot. Arrange slices of beef in individual fondue plates with dips. Bring fondue pot to the table and place it covered on top of its base. Each guest takes a slice of beef with a fondue fork, cooks it in the broth and dips it into one of the sauces.
6. At the end, serve with an egg yolk.
